aka: The Mysterious Adventures of Claude Conseil
this_title: Les mystérieuses aventures de claude Conseil
trans_title: 克劳德的神秘奇幻旅程
The Mysterious Adventures of Claude Conseil
introduction: Claude Conseil lives with her husband in a house in the middle of the woods. She spends her time listening to birds. One day, mysterious phone calls break the calm of the forest.
chinese_title: 克劳德的神秘奇幻旅程
foreign_title: Les mystérieuses aventures de claude Conseil
